name: REKAS
tagline: Waste Retribution Transformation: Digital, Accurate, and Transparent for Regional Revenue.

data.title: Modern Electronic Waste Retribution System
data.description: REKAS digitalizes the entire retribution process from end-to-end to enhance the operational efficiency of Department Staff, Technical Units (UPT), and Field Collection Officers.

features.title: Subject & NPWRD Registration
features.desc: Digitalized data entry for retribution-obligated parties and instant issuance of NPWRD cards for Households, Commercial, and Industrial sectors.

features.title: SKRD & SSRD Determination
features.desc: Automated tariff calculation, printing of Regional Retribution Assessment Letters (SKRD), and instant issuance of Digital Deposit Receipts (SSRD).

features.title: Mobile Billing & Monitoring
features.desc: Field officers are equipped with a mobile application to monitor outstanding bills and perform real-time payment validation.

features.title: Departmental Monitoring Dashboard
features.desc: Monitor retribution target achievements and daily financial summaries without the need for error-prone manual recaps.

items.title: Minimize Revenue Leakage
items.desc: Automated digital validation ensures all collected retributions are transparently recorded and accurately deposited into regional treasury.

items.title: Operational Efficiency
items.desc: Eliminating slow manual recapitulation processes. Field officers can work faster with integrated mobile application support.

items.title: Data-Driven Leadership
items.desc: Management can monitor daily retribution targets through interactive dashboards for more precise policy-making.

items.title: Eco-friendly (Paperless)
items.desc: Supporting the go-green movement by issuing digital invoices and receipts sent directly via WhatsApp or Email to taxpayers.

items.q: How does REKAS prevent regional revenue (PAD) leakage?
items.a: Through digital validation at every stage; deposit receipts (SSRD) are only issued after treasurer validation, and all transactions are recorded in real-time within permanent system logs.

items.q: Does this system support paperless operations?
items.a: Yes. All documents, including Assessment Letters (SKRD) and Deposit Receipts (SSRD), can be sent directly to retribution payers via WhatsApp or Email, significantly reducing printing costs.

items.q: Who are the users involved in the REKAS system?
items.a: REKAS is designed for cross-role collaboration: Department/UPT Staff (Administration), Treasurers (Financial Validation), Collectors (Field Operations), and Department Heads (Monitoring).
